bazarr.description: A Helm chart for deploying Bazarr

arr-common.description: A Helm library chart for arr-stack applications

existingSecret.description:
Name of a pre-existing Kubernetes Secret whose keys will be loaded as
environment variables in the Gluetun container via envFrom.secretRef.
Set this OR gluetun.env — never both.
existingSecret.title: existingSecret

hosts.description:
hosts:
  - host: chart-example.local
    paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
hosts.title: hosts

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

arr-common.title: arr-common

enabled.description: Conditional property used in parent chart
enabled.title: enabled

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global
